# SQLite server error handling test with aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts for error scenarios
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=800ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=600ms
env SQLITE_DB_PATH=$WORK/error_test.db

# Start the server
exec timeout 8s go run . &
wait 150ms

# Test invalid SQL syntax with rapid error reporting
cat > invalid_sql.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_query",
    "arguments": {
      "query": "SELCT * FROM nonexistent"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<invalid_sql.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Error executing query|syntax error'

# Test query on nonexistent table
cat > nonexistent_table.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_query", 
    "arguments": {
      "query": "SELECT * FROM nonexistent_table"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<nonexistent_table.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Error executing query|no such table'

# Test missing required parameter
cat > missing_param.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_query",
    "arguments": {}
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<missing_param.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'query parameter is required'

# Test invalid parameter type
cat > invalid_param.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0", 
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "execute_statement",
    "arguments": {
      "statement": 123
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1s echo "$(<invalid_param.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'statement parameter is required and must be a string'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f invalid_sql.json nonexistent_table.json missing_param.json invalid_param.json
